settings.text: Stop Paying Airlines to Carry Your Own Clothes.

settings.custom_liquid:
<style>

settings.quote_text: Voltairs travel bags compresses your clothes to about 40% of their size — so you pack up to 10 days of outfits in one carry-on, skip checked bags, and save around $112 per round trip.

settings.promise_text: Skip checked bags, save around $112 per round trip, and pack 10 days of clothes in one carry-on — with a vacuum kit engineered around the three things other compression bags get wrong.

settings.text: Pack 10 Days of Clothes in a Carry-On
One Voltairs bag holds roughly 18–22 lb of clothes — about 10 days of outfits when compressed.

• One Voltairs bag holds up to 18–22 lb of clothing. Compressed down to ~40% of its original size, that's about 10 days of mixed outfits — jeans, tees, a sweater, underwear, socks — inside a standard carry-on.

settings.heading: When will I get my order?

settings.text: We will work quickly to ship your order as soon as possible. Once your order has shipped, you will receive an email with further information. Delivery times vary depending on your location.
Our products are manufactured both locally and globally. We carefully select our manufacturing partners to ensure our products are high quality and a fair value.
Shipping is calculated based on your location and the items in your order. You will always know the shipping price before you purchase.
